headline: Robinhood, Webull, Interactive Brokers Set To Gain As PDT Rule Dies Today
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission eliminates the PDT rule for accounts under $25,000, benefiting HOOD, BULL and IBKR.

headline: George Santos Allegedly Made Tens Of Thousands Betting Against His Own Attendance On Kalshi: Report
summary: Former Congressman George Santos is under federal investigation for allegedly making tens of thousands on Kalshi by betting against his own SOTU attendance.
